dovish_deesc_strong.title: 🟢 Maximum Risk-On — Peak Cycle
dovish_deesc_strong.note: Full risk budget justified. Reduce cash to minimum. Monitor for froth in speculative names.

dovish_deesc_base.title: 🟢 Risk-On — Quality Growth Leads
dovish_deesc_base.note: Add to highest-conviction names on any dip. Speculative biotech gets partial allocation.

dovish_base_strong.title: 🟢 Broad Risk-On — LNG + AI Sweet Spot
dovish_base_strong.note: Current best-case: cuts + frozen conflict + strong growth. LNG structural + Fed support = ideal.

dovish_base_base.title: 🟢 Constructive — LNG + AI Core Positions
dovish_base_base.note: Solid entry point for core positions. Staged accumulation recommended.

dovish_base_slowing.title: 🟡 Selective — Defensives + Quality Growth
dovish_base_slowing.note: Cuts help but growth drag limits upside. Stick to cash-flow generators.

dovish_base_recession.title: 🟠 Stagflation Signal — Hard Assets Only
dovish_base_recession.note: Forced cuts into recession = stagflationary setup. Commodity supply shock persists vs demand weakness.

dovish_esc_strong.title: 🟡 Bifurcated — Hard Assets + Domestic Energy
dovish_esc_strong.note: Escalation caps P/E expansion even with dovish Fed. Energy security premium builds.

dovish_esc_base.title: 🟡 Selective Energy Focus
dovish_esc_base.note: Escalation + dovish = energy safe haven + Fed support. Mixed signal.

dovish_esc_slowing.title: 🟠 Defensive Energy Dominates
dovish_esc_slowing.note: Three headwinds collide: escalation + slowing + need for cuts. Quality cash flows only.

dovish_esc_recession.title: 🔴 Crisis Regime — Preserve Capital
dovish_esc_recession.note: Escalation + recession + forced cuts = very few safe equity harbors. Cheniere SPA income the only equity bet.

dovish_longwar_strong.title: 🟠 Energy Security Premium + Structural Inflation
dovish_longwar_strong.note: Long war embeds structural inflation. Cuts forced by politics — stagflation risk elevated.

dovish_longwar_base.title: 🟠 Commodities + Infrastructure Core
dovish_longwar_base.note: Long war + dovish = embedded inflation. Real assets outperform financial assets.

dovish_longwar_slowing.title: 🔴 Stagflation Maximum
dovish_longwar_slowing.note: Worst macro combination for equity multiples. Only contracted cash flows survive.

dovish_longwar_recession.title: 🔴 Extreme Stagflation
dovish_longwar_recession.note: Historical precedent: 1970s stagflation. Energy assets as real stores of value only.

neutral_deesc_strong.title: 🟢 Selective Growth — Quality Wins
neutral_deesc_strong.note: Current near-optimal scenario. Buy quality, avoid narrative. Conviction sizing matters most here.

neutral_deesc_base.title: 🟢 Quality Growth — Core Positions
neutral_deesc_base.note: Reward quality over narrative. Staged accumulation in highest-conviction names.

neutral_base_strong.title: 🟡 Base Case — Balanced Positioning
neutral_base_strong.note: Today's regime (Apr 2026). Hold core, selectively add on dips.

neutral_base_base.title: 🟡 CURRENT REGIME — Disciplined Core Holdings
neutral_base_base.note: ⚡ This matches your current setting. Focus on cash-flow visibility. No thesis without earnings.

neutral_base_slowing.title: 🟡 Defensively Positioned — Cash Flows First
hedge: Reduce AI Infra to only VRT
neutral_base_slowing.note: Slowing growth + neutral Fed = earnings pressure building. Rotate toward contracted revenues.

neutral_base_recession.title: 🟠 Risk-Off — Contracted Cashflows Only
neutral_base_recession.note: Reduce portfolio to only highest-conviction cash flow generators. Size down across the board.

neutral_esc_strong.title: 🟡 Energy Security — US Domestic Focus
neutral_esc_strong.note: Escalation with decent growth = energy security premium is your friend. US domestic names.

neutral_esc_base.title: 🟡 Defensive Posture — Hard Assets
neutral_esc_base.note: Geopolitical risk premium is real. Avoid anything with European supply chain exposure.

neutral_esc_slowing.title: 🟠 Hard Assets + Defense
neutral_esc_slowing.note: Triple headwind scenario starting to form. Narrow position list aggressively.

neutral_esc_recession.title: 🔴 Defensive Maximum
neutral_esc_recession.note: Escalation + recession + neutral Fed = Fed can't save you. Capital preservation mode.

neutral_longwar_strong.title: 🟠 Hard Assets — Inflation Embedded
neutral_longwar_strong.note: Long war + neutral + strong growth = unusual combo. Energy security premium dominant.

neutral_longwar_base.title: 🟠 Pipelines + Inflation Plays
neutral_longwar_base.note: Real assets outperform. Contracted revenues with inflation pass-through best risk-reward.

neutral_longwar_slowing.title: 🔴 Stagflationary — Reduce Broadly
neutral_longwar_slowing.note: Long war + slowing + neutral = stagflation building. Reduce equities, increase real assets.

neutral_longwar_recession.title: 🔴 Extreme Caution — Capital Preservation
neutral_longwar_recession.note: Long war embedding inflation into recession. Very few safe harbors in public markets.

hawkish_deesc_strong.title: 🟡 Value + FCF — P/E Compression Risk
hawkish_deesc_strong.note: Hikes into peace + growth = P/E compression hurts multiples. Only buy what earns today.

hawkish_deesc_base.title: 🟡 Selective Value
over: FCF yield plays: LNG, midstream, majors
hawkish_deesc_base.note: Value wins over growth when rates are high and staying there. Only buy what earns now.

hawkish_base_strong.title: 🟡 Cautious — FCF Yield Focus
hawkish_base_strong.note: Hawkish + base conflict = rate pressure meets decent growth. Quality cash flows only.

hawkish_base_base.title: 🟠 Cautious Positioning — Defensive Bias
hawkish_base_base.note: Hawkish hold + base = only buy what earns. No thesis supported by future multiples.

hawkish_base_slowing.title: 🟠 Reduce Growth Exposure
hawkish_base_slowing.note: Slowing growth + hawkish = earnings compression + multiple compression simultaneously.

hawkish_base_recession.title: 🔴 Recession + Hikes = Forced Fed Pivot Coming
hawkish_base_recession.note: Position for forced pivot. Buy LNG/VRT when Fed capitulates. Don't front-run the pivot.

hawkish_esc_strong.title: 🔴 Rare High-Risk Combination
hawkish_esc_strong.note: Hawkish + escalation = max uncertainty. Reduce size broadly. Don't be a hero.

hawkish_esc_base.title: 🔴 Risk-Off — Commodities + Gold
hawkish_esc_base.note: Rare but dangerous combo. Few equity positions justified. Wait for clarity.

hawkish_esc_slowing.title: 🔴 Preserve Capital
hawkish_esc_slowing.note: Three risk factors simultaneous. Preserve capital as priority #1.

hawkish_esc_recession.title: 🔴 Crisis Mode
hawkish_esc_recession.note: This is the scenario to have been positioned for 6 months ago. Don't panic-sell; hold cash.

hawkish_longwar_strong.title: 🟠 Hard Assets Only
hawkish_longwar_strong.note: Strong growth + war + hikes = 1970s echo. Energy and commodity assets win.

hawkish_longwar_base.title: 🟠 Defensive Energy Focus
hawkish_longwar_base.note: War premium partially offsets rate pressure in energy. Careful sizing.

hawkish_longwar_slowing.title: 🔴 Defensive Maximum — Very Few Positions
hawkish_longwar_slowing.note: Very few equity positions can navigate this. Cash + gold + short duration.

hawkish_longwar_recession.title: 🔴 Exceptional Risk — Historical Parallel: 1974
hawkish_longwar_recession.note: Historical parallel: 1973–74 stagflation + oil shock. Equities -40% peak to trough. Prepare.

hiking_deesc_strong.title: 🟡 Value Wins — 2022 Energy Echo
hiking_deesc_strong.note: Hikes into peace + growth = 2022 redux. Energy value worked then, likely again.

hiking_deesc_base.title: 🟡 Value + FCF — No Growth Premium
hiking_deesc_base.note: Hiking cycle punishes growth multiples. Only own things with current earnings.

hiking_base_strong.title: 🟠 Active Hiking — Selective Defense
hiking_base_strong.note: Hiking + base = multiple compression everywhere. Energy dividend yield floor helps.

hiking_base_base.title: 🟠 Selective Defense — Income Focus
hiking_base_base.note: Active hiking + base growth = earnings matter, nothing else. Yield > growth.

hiking_base_slowing.title: 🔴 Policy Error Risk — Reduce All Growth
hiking_base_slowing.note: Hiking into slowing growth = policy error scenario. Position for forced pivot.

hiking_base_recession.title: 🔴 Policy Error Confirmed
hiking_base_recession.note: Fed hiking into recession = 2008 delayed response scenario. Capital preservation only.

hiking_esc_strong.title: 🔴 Defensive Maximum in Equity Space
hiking_esc_strong.note: Very rare high-risk combo. Hiking + escalation = reduce equity exposure broadly.

hiking_esc_base.title: 🔴 Broad Risk-Off — Few Exceptions
hiking_esc_base.note: War premium + hiking = almost nothing works except hard assets and short duration.

hiking_esc_slowing.title: 🔴 Crisis Regime — Near-Zero Equity Allocation
hiking_esc_slowing.note: Three simultaneous risk factors. Lowest equity allocation justified.

hiking_esc_recession.title: 🔴 Exceptional Risk — Historical Extremes
hiking_esc_recession.note: Extreme scenario. Historical parallel: worst quarters of 1974, 1980, 2008. Preserve capital.

hiking_longwar_strong.title: 🟠 Hard Assets — Limited Equity Opportunity
hiking_longwar_strong.note: Strong growth partially offsets but war + hikes = constrained equity upside.

hiking_longwar_base.title: 🔴 Defensive Focus
hiking_longwar_base.note: Long war + hiking + base = stagflation building. Only own real return generators.

hiking_longwar_slowing.title: 🔴 Near-Maximum Caution
hiking_longwar_slowing.note: Very few equity positions. Hiking into war + slowdown = systematic risk premium collapses.

hiking_longwar_recession.title: 🔴 MAXIMUM CAUTION — All Risk Factors Aligned
hiking_longwar_recession.note: Every risk factor firing simultaneously. Equity allocation approaches zero. This is when fortunes are lost or preserved. Preserve.

dovish_deesc_slowing.title: 🟡 Growth Fades but Fed Cuts — Quality Defensive
dovish_deesc_slowing.note: De-escalation removes war risk but slowing growth limits upside. Cuts help duration. Stick to quality cash flows.

dovish_deesc_recession.title: 🟠 Recession + Cuts — Forced Risk-Off Despite Peace
dovish_deesc_recession.note: Peace helps sentiment but recession overrides. Cuts provide some relief — buy quality on the lows.

neutral_deesc_slowing.title: 🟡 Selective Defensives — Peace Dividend Fading
neutral_deesc_slowing.note: De-escalation premium already priced in. Slowing growth dominates. Rotate toward contracted revenues.

neutral_deesc_recession.title: 🟠 Risk-Off — Recession Trumps Peace
neutral_deesc_recession.note: Recession + neutral = Fed forced to cut eventually. Position for pivot but don't front-run. Quality only.

hawkish_deesc_slowing.title: 🟠 Compression Risk — Slowing + High Rates
hawkish_deesc_slowing.note: Hawkish + slowing = policy error risk. Only own what earns today. Prepare for forced pivot buying opportunity.

hawkish_deesc_recession.title: 🔴 Policy Error — Forced Pivot Coming
hawkish_deesc_recession.note: Fed hiking into recession despite de-escalation = policy error confirmed. Sit in cash; buy aggressively on first cut signal.

hiking_deesc_slowing.title: 🔴 Policy Error Building — Capital Preservation
hiking_deesc_slowing.note: Active hiking + slowing = Fed behind the curve. Reduce equity exposure significantly. Wait for the pivot.

hiking_deesc_recession.title: 🔴 Policy Error Confirmed — Maximum Cash
under: All equities — wait for capitulation + pivot
hiking_deesc_recession.note: Hiking into recession with de-escalation = pure policy error. This is the time to build the shopping list, not the portfolio.
